creator: vishwin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Torsten Zuehlsdorff from comment #50)
File conflicts amongst other problems. Only one version per SONAME is meant to be installed in the same environment at a time. You cannot just move certain ports to the new port whilst keeping others on the existing one, especially where dependencies are shared.

phab is updated with 2.46.3, but I haven't had a chance to runtime test anything yet.
